craigslist.title: Large 2 Bed, 1 Bath Basement Apartment | Available 8/1
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Large 2 Bed, 1 Bath Basement Apartment | Available 8/1 225 E Hansen Rdg, Lehi, UT 84043 1800.00 / Month 2 BEDROOMS | 1 BATHROOMS Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6MTE5MjY1Nw==?property=2720465&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/225-e-hansen-rdg-lehi-ut/2f6b0615-952d-4d9d-9ea6-9942eaa574b2?source=craigslist Property Description: Huge 1800-square foot basement apartment in a beautiful, calm neighborhood in Lehi. - Large kitchen with tons of cabinets and storage, gas stove - 2 Large Bedrooms - Massive family room and dining area - Washer/dryer included in the apartment - Well-lit separate entrance and off-street parking - Large dedicated storage area - Flat fee utilities - Family friendly with 2 beautiful parks less than a quarter mile away - 5 minutes from freeway, grocery stores, and schools - Background check and credit check required for application Available 8/1/26 Property Type : Single Family Pets : No Pets Allowed Smoking : NO Lease Term : 1800.00 / Month 1000.00 Deposit Lease Length: One Year Available: 08/01/2026 Occupancy Limit: 5 People Utilities Included : Appliances : Dishwasher Garbage Disposal Microwave Dryer Freezer Refrigerator Washer Range Oven Amenities : Near Parks Heating & Cooling : Forced Air Central Interested?
